feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: US is now begging Iran for a 'do over' >Iran controls the straight of hormuz >Ir…
entry.content: US is now begging Iran for a 'do over' >Iran controls the straight of hormuz >Iran ally controls al-Mandeb straight >us can't bomb their drones (for some reason?) >us can't bomb their leadership (for some reason?) >us can't bomb their 'nuclear' (was 'destroyed' & now it wasn't) >Gas prices starting to skyrocket again >states 'greatest faggot' lindsey is now dead >this is a war of attrition, just like Vietnam >us will run out of bombs b4 irans will breaks can't wait for more red hat influencers c

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Can I be real for a second?
entry.content: This board is fucking atrocious right now. You're all acting like a bunch of whiny, entitled little babies. Nolan made for you an entire movie about ancient greece. He made it for YOU, and he is going to wake up tomorrow morning and see that instead of enjoying it, this community of "fans" picked out the 3 or 4 things that weren't perfect and are using that to fucking riot. Guess what? The movie was never going to be perfect. It was never going to live up to your hype. It was never going to be e

entry.title: /b/ Random: 1039 faces labeled her. censored dump from his Photos.
entry.content: Remote session archive. This loser has an entire Photos People stack for his celebrity crush — 1039 faces under one name. Partner faces indexed next to it. Fetish tabs open while he builds a control fantasy around her. Bars on the pic, not on the truth. He knows. You would too if you saw his library counts. Permanent.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Anyone feel like there's a particular crusade against the "and he gets a girl at…
entry.content: Anyone feel like there's a particular crusade against the "and he gets a girl at the end" element of the Hero's Journey in video games nowadays? You know, the whole reason he's on the journey to begin with?

entry.title: /b/ Random: this one time I caught leprosy off a toilet seat and my dingerdonger fell off an…
entry.content: this one time I caught leprosy off a toilet seat and my dingerdonger fell off and it took like a whole week to grow back so yeah, that means you're gay u gay cunt

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is supporting indie devs moral? All that money goes to a single person that make…
entry.content: Is supporting indie devs moral? All that money goes to a single person that makes a product that's not equal to AAA. Whereas supporting companies means your money is going towards supporting MANY families and high quality products.

entry.content: This shit was awful when I was a kid and it's awful re-watching it as an adult. Mulan, and The Prince of Egypt came out the same year btw

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Poseidon > Titanic There I said it. No, I will not apologize. It's simply the be…
entry.content: Poseidon > Titanic There I said it. No, I will not apologize. It's simply the best disaster movie despite having Kurt Russel star in it.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Whats the solution to the collector problem? You can't afford the original copie…
entry.content: Whats the solution to the collector problem? You can't afford the original copies anymore so how are people growing up supposed to experience these games? Emulation is not the answer. Native will always be better. >Just hardwaremod everything bro and install all these 10 mods! No, too much effort for everyone.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Monster Hunter
entry.content: This game is everything I imagined as a kid Pokemon would become. Super high production value, probably the nicest anime character models that aren't gacha , big open zones where I can ride my monster... I've never even played a MonHun game before but FUCK this is what I always wanted My only issue is the monsters are kinda ugly, and you don't get any evos like you do with Pokemon or Digimon. But there's a few I like

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Ray Gunn ('26)

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I N F I N I T E J E S T
entry.content: YEAR OF GLAD I am seated in an office, surrounded by heads and bodies. My posture is consciously congruent to the shape of my hard chair. This is a cold room in University Administration, wood-walled, Remington-hung, double-windowed against the November heat, insulated from Administrative sounds by the reception area outside, at which Uncle Charles, Mr. deLint and I were lately received. I am in here. Three faces have resolved into place above summer-weight sportcoats and half-Windsors across a

entry.content: when Christians ask where your morality comes from say this: >I have an inexplicable voice in my head that guides me towards feelings of wrongness/rightness. I base my morality on how strong these feelings are. In short: My emotions. I base my morality on my emotions. that's it gg christcucks have 0 response to this because you just described how Christians derive their morality from god but in a secular way so for them to argue against this is arguing against themselves. If you want to take it

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PDF TO AUDIO WEBSITE FEEDBACK
entry.content: Hello , i've made a software (using ai )that converts pdf to audio, no sign up ,no paywall. just upload your pdf and get an audio ,also a downloadable mp3. https://papervoice.onrender.com/ . I wanted to know the user feedback on this. Feel free for constructive criticism

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Invited to meet Peter Jackson, the Tolkien family preferred not to. Why? “They …
entry.content: >Invited to meet Peter Jackson, the Tolkien family preferred not to. Why? “They eviscerated the book by making it an action movie for young people 15 to 25,” Christopher says regretfully. “And it seems that The Hobbit will be the same kind of film.” >The divorce is systematically reactivated by the movies. “Tolkien has become a monster, devoured by his own popularity and absorbed by the absurdity of our time,” Christopher Tolkien observes sadly. “The chasm between the beauty and seriousness of t

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Family Channel was a US-based television network active from 1989 to 1997. P…
entry.content: The Family Channel was a US-based television network active from 1989 to 1997. Prior to 1989, it was known under various versions of the name CBN (short for 'Christian Broadcasting Network'). After 1997, it was sold to a consortium jointly owned by Rupert Murdoch and Haim Saban. During its time as The Family Channel, CBN's president Pat Robertson purchased a blimp in order to bring publicity to the network. The blimp was often deployed at NASCAR races and sporting events. The blimp also went on

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Evil Dead Rise
entry.content: After watching the newest Evil Dead, its made me come to appreciate this movie more. I feel its rather underrated, and has a lot of good things going for it. The old apartment complex is a nice setting for a change. Lots of intense moments that still stick with me from watching the first time. A likeable cast of characters. Downsides are lack of kills, and no cameos of Ash.It definitely had better chemistry and gore than the new movie out does.

entry.content: Reminder that if you say racism on this website you will be more prone to saying it in real life as you will get accustomed to saying it. However, once you say it in real life, le consequences will not be just me telling you go back to /pol/. le consequences are you will get jumped. You may also get fired, although I oppose such decisions, as everybody should be employed. Think about this whenever you have le time.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: YT Sux - RSS feeds Plz :)
entry.content: I have been using invidious as a youtube font-end for years now. No front page or shorts present, just a box to search for a video. Had a quick look at the current state of YouTube in 2k26 and oh my god, what a miserable experience. There is so much clutter, distraction and wasted space. Video previews autoplay instantly as you hover over them with an obnoxious colour blob to highlight the current video. Thumbnails are aggressively shocking. It used to be only a few videos which did it but like

entry.title: /g/ Technology: when you think about it, Manufacture technology is one of the few industries tha…
entry.content: when you think about it, Manufacture technology is one of the few industries that serves the interests of humanity Engineers keep making technology, especially chips better and better. They're scraping the bottom of the barrel, and doing everything they possibly can to make technology better. And taking science, engineering, and physics to its absolute limits. They have mastered chip manufacture to such a degrees they're up against the limits of what is physically, theoretically possible. Basica

entry.title: /b/ Random: We're roughly at the halfway point of our weekend wank sessions, how's it all go…
entry.content: We're roughly at the halfway point of our weekend wank sessions, how's it all going? I've had a couple of really good ones, a third was ruined when Amazon wanted a fucking signature and another was utterly destroyed when I accidentally wanked out a colossal foul-smelling bottom burp and was entirely unable to continue until the air was fit to breathe again.

entry.title: /b/ Random: How expensive is to live in the us for a year?
entry.content: hello, i will be migrating to idaho either in boise or couer d alane for a couple of years for a job via visa and i am doing a budget of expenses (food, gas for transportation clothing) and i would appreciate if anyone could tell me how much money it takes to live there i dont mean anything fancy like going out to eat every day and expensive clothing, but more day to day expenses any help would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I was trying to find out what genre this song I found is, so I could look up mor…
entry.content: I was trying to find out what genre this song I found is, so I could look up more songs like it, and the bandcamp page says breakbeat. But I looked up what breakbeat is and the description gave me a headache so that didn't help. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z1p 1qCkRSWs Is this actually breakbeat or is it something else?
